kairos_cluster_warnings: T1 Nuclear & AI-power (LEU, OKLO, NNE, CCJ, SMR) — size as one sleeve; OKLO is sole top-3 rep.
T3 AI optics/CPO (ALAB, LITE, AAOI, COHR, POET) — single theme bet.
T5 Space economy (RKLB, LUNR, RDW, ASTS) — RKLB sole rep, size as one.
T6 Power-semis (NVTS, WOLF, ON, MPWR) — NVTS sole rep.
T2 rare-earth (USAR, MP) and T4 defence (ONDS, KTOS, AVAV) — each one sleeve.
